basics.name: Larra Lapid
basics.label: ServiceNow Developer | ITSM & CSM | Custom Application Development
basics.summary: ServiceNow developer and technical solutions consultant with 9 years of experience from 2017 to present, focused on ITSM, CSM, custom application development, workflow automation, and platform delivery. Experienced translating business requirements into scalable ServiceNow designs across Service Portal, Configurable Workspace, Flow Designer, Performance Analytics, IntegrationHub, REST/SOAP integrations, ACLs, upgrades, and release support. Current Peraton work centers on ServiceNow custom application development in an NDA-restricted environment. Strong background combining hands-on platform engineering, consulting solutioning, and practical delivery discipline.

work.summary: Develops and maintains a custom ServiceNow application in an NDA-restricted environment.
highlights: Develop and maintain a custom ServiceNow application in an NDA-restricted environment; project details cannot be disclosed.
Build maintainable platform functionality across application logic, workflows, forms, data models, security controls, and user experience refinements.
Partner with project stakeholders to translate requirements into ServiceNow development work while protecting sensitive program information.

work.position: ServiceNow Technical Solutions Consultant - ITSM & CSM
work.summary: Supported go-to-market and solutioning preparation for ServiceNow ITSM and CSM offerings.
highlights: Assisted in preparing go-to-market materials for ServiceNow ITSM and CSM offerings while client engagements were not yet ready for delivery.
Developed reusable sales enablement, solutioning, and implementation planning content for ServiceNow opportunities.
Mapped ITSM and CSM capabilities to customer service, support operations, process improvement, and platform modernization use cases.

work.summary: Founded an independent technical consulting practice focused on ServiceNow, automation, and process improvement.
highlights: Founded an independent technical consulting practice focused on ServiceNow, automation, and process improvement.
Designed practical solution approaches for ITSM, CSM, workflow optimization, integrations, and technical enablement.
Built tooling and documentation to improve delivery consistency and operational clarity.

work.summary: Maintained and enhanced ServiceNow implementations with emphasis on ITSM delivery, upgrades, and platform governance.
highlights: Maintained ServiceNow instance health, supported upgrade planning, and executed platform deployments.
Led technical backlog grooming, sprint planning, and solution architecture for ServiceNow delivery work.
Delivered integrated ITSM solutions using ServiceNow best practices and release governance.
Collaborated across business and engineering teams to streamline operational support workflows.

work.summary: Delivered ServiceNow consulting services across ITSM, CSM, ITOM, custom applications, and integrations.
highlights: Delivered ServiceNow consulting services across ITSM, CSM, ITOM, custom applications, and integrations.
Supported and enhanced ServiceNow applications across multiple client backlogs.

Created a custom Report Authoring Tool application for Booz Allen Hamilton, built for an intelligence operations team; aggregated data from multiple sources and integrated with CSM for tracking report requests and delivery.
Designed and deployed a custom pricing calculator application for CBTS on a domain-separated instance with CSM customer-facing workflows.
Built and maintained REST/SOAP integrations, configured ACLs, optimized workflows, and collaborated directly with client teams.

work.summary: Maintained GRNI/GRIR ledgers and reconciled discrepancies across healthcare subsidiaries.
highlights: Maintained GRNI/GRIR ledgers and reconciled discrepancies across healthcare subsidiaries.
